name: career-ops
description: Open-source AI job search: scan job portals, score listings A-F, tailor your CV, track applications — runs locally in your AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, OpenCode…)
summaryZh: Open-source AI job search: scan job portals, score listings A-F, tailor your CV, track applications — runs locally in your AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, OpenCode…) 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
